_note_n_workers: n_workers: parallel pool size for pre-pass, streaming, and rendering. null = cpu_count.
_note_plot_branches: Set plot_branches per tree to restrict which branches are plotted. null or absent key plots all branches.
_note_plot_thresholds: Plot-only event selection, independent of selections/BDT/selection.json. Scalar = col > value. [lo, hi] = lo < col < hi. Applied even with --no-selection.
